title: Accelerator
description: A mod that adds blocks which speed up other blocks
body:
This mod adds 4 Tiers of the Accelerator Block, from Tier 1 to Tier 4, each tier increasing in speed and cost.
The Accelerator block speeds up blocks AND crops in a 5x5 cube around it (extends 2 blocks out).
Speed bonuses from Accelerator blocks can stack together.


The speed of accelerator blocks can be configured in config/accelerator.toml
Recipes can be changed using datapacks

NOTE:
If you are a modpack creator, please note that this can be quite overpowered. You can, however change the speed of the blocks in config/accelerator.toml in the .minecraft folder.
